prompt.content: A transformation preserves distance and angle measure. Which statement must be true?

choices.content: The image is congruent to the original figure.
The image is always larger than the original figure.
The image must be in the same location as the original figure.
The area of the image must be different from the original figure.

steps.content: If distance and angle measure are preserved, the size and shape stay the same. The image is congruent to the original figure.
